commands.name: translate

options.name: --prefix
options.description:
Prefix for the resulting files. If not specified files will
be changed in place.

arguments.name: base-file
arguments.description:
Base file that is used by 'kli.Localize'. Relative to the 
current directory.

commands.description:
Update and translate locale files according to the base file 
and their respective culture postfix.

commands.name: get

arguments.name: config-key
arguments.description:
Config key to get the value for. For nested values use 
':' as separator.

commands.description: Gets the configuration value for the given key.

commands.name: set

arguments.name: config-key
arguments.description:
Config key to be set. For nested values use ':' as 
separator.

arguments.name: config-value
arguments.description:
Config value the key should be set to. Leave empty to 
unset.

commands.description: Sets the given config key to the given value.
examples: config set DeepL:Context 'This is additional  context'
